forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not hardcode sidebar_status_state; it must consume backend-authoritative state.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \bsidebar_status_state\s*=\s*['"][^'"]+['"]

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not hardcode sidebar_status_label; it must consume backend-authoritative labels.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \bsidebar_status_label\s*=\s*['"][^'"]+['"]

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not synthesize sidebar_status_state via object literals.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \bsidebar_status_state\s*:\s*['"][^'"]+['"]

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not synthesize sidebar_status_label via object literals.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \bsidebar_status_label\s*:\s*['"][^'"]+['"]

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not inject synthetic pending status fallbacks for sidebar authority state.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \bsidebar_status_(state|label)\b[^\n]{0,120}\|\|\s*['"]pending['"]

forbidden_patterns.description: Fallback defaults for sidebar_status_state should be minimized and justified.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \bsidebar_status_state\s*\|\|

forbidden_patterns.description: Fallback defaults for sidebar_status_label should be minimized and justified.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \bsidebar_status_label\s*\|\|

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell retry/backoff policy branching should stay non-authoritative and observable only.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \b(if|switch)\s*\([^\n]{0,220}\b(retry|backoff|quarantine|defer)\b

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell lane-selection heuristics indicate shell truth leakage risk.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \b(if|switch)\s*\([^\n]{0,220}\b(lane|lane_id|selectedLane|resolveLane|chooseLane)\b

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not select workspace/web/tool routes locally; routing decisions must come from orchestration/kernel contracts.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \b(if|switch)\s*\([^\n]{0,260}\b(tool_route|toolRoute|routeTool|selectedTool|workspace_read|workspace_search|web_search|web_fetch)\b

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not branch local authority policy from runtime status fields; consume backend-authoritative state/freshness directly.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \b(if|switch)\s*\([^\n]{0,260}\b(sidebar_status_state|sidebar_status_label|sidebar_status_freshness)\b

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not emit repeated workflow-state retry-loop boilerplate instead of a direct user answer.
forbidden_patterns.regex: workflow state was unexpected\. Please retry so I can rerun the chain cleanly\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not admit automatic tool triggering as a normal path; tool selection must stay LLM-controlled.
forbidden_patterns.regex: automatically triggering tool calls without (my|the model'?s) conscious selection

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should not route local file/workspace intents into web search fallback copy.
forbidden_patterns.regex: (web search tool triggered incorrectly|defaulted to external search instead of internal file tools)

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not emit repeated workflow-gate unexpected-state retry boilerplate instead of directly answering.
forbidden_patterns.regex: I completed the workflow gate, but the final workflow state was unexpected\. Please retry so I can rerun the chain cleanly\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not emit repeated workflow-gate unexpected-state boilerplate even when retry suffix is omitted.
forbidden_patterns.regex: I completed the workflow gate, but the final workflow state was unexpected\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not emit repeated final-reply-not-rendered boilerplate loops.
forbidden_patterns.regex: I completed the run, but the final reply did not render\. Ask me to continue and I will synthesize from (?:the\s+)?recorded workflow state\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should avoid short final-reply-not-rendered templates that suppress direct user answers.
forbidden_patterns.regex: final reply did not render

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should avoid repeating canned next-actions boilerplate when direct user answers are available.
forbidden_patterns.regex: Next actions:\s*1\) clarify the exact outcome you want\s*2\) run one targeted tool call\s*3\) return a concise answer from current context

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should avoid unnumbered next-actions retry boilerplate and provide direct synthesized guidance instead.
forbidden_patterns.regex: final workflow state was unexpected\.\s*Next actions:\s*run one targeted tool call,\s*then return a concise answer from current context\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not emit internal route-classification boilerplate instead of a direct user answer.
forbidden_patterns.regex: The first gate \("(?:workflow_route|task_or_info_route)"\) is still classifying this as an "info" route rather than a "task" route\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not emit task-classification-path diagnostic boilerplate instead of direct guidance.
forbidden_patterns.regex: (?:needs explicit tool-related phrasing to trigger the task classification path|still seeing this as a conversational exchange rather than a tool operation request)

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not emit automated binary route-classifier internals in user-facing output.
forbidden_patterns.regex: (?:workflow_route|task_or_info_route).{0,220}(?:binary classification|automated classification based on semantic analysis|defaults to info)

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not claim the decision tree auto-classifies requests into info/task routes.
forbidden_patterns.regex: decision tree.{0,140}automatically classifies requests as either "info".{0,80}"task".{0,180}semantic analysis

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not leak internal workflow gate source tags in user-facing output.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \[source:workflow_gate\]

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not leak internal tool decision-tree source tags in user-facing output.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \[source:tool_decision_tree_v3\]

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not leak extended internal workflow source tags in user-facing output.
forbidden_patterns.regex: \[source:(?:workflow_route_classification|gate_enforcement_mode|tool_decision_policy|conversation_bypass_control|agent_framework_analysis|tool_gate)\]

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not claim conversation-bypass internals are restricting normal tool use in user-facing output.
forbidden_patterns.regex: (?:conversation bypass mode is currently active|restricted from running web searches|can'?t autonomously decide to use web tools|requires manual step-by-step authorization for tool usage)

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not admit backend automation is auto-triggering tool calls outside LLM routing control.
forbidden_patterns.regex: automatically triggering web searches through some backend automation that bypasses my conscious tool selection process

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should avoid repeating static policy-gate templates for file-list failures and instead provide direct, actionable routing guidance.
forbidden_patterns.regex: The File List step was blocked before I could finish the answer:\s*This is a policy gate, not a web-provider outage\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should not surface raw tool trace blocked templates instead of synthesized operator guidance.
forbidden_patterns.regex: Tool trace complete1 done\s*·\s*1 blocked

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should not surface generic blocked tool-trace templates instead of synthesized operator guidance.
forbidden_patterns.regex: Tool trace complete\d*\s*done\s*[·•]\s*\d+\s*blocked

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should not return generic capability-surface boilerplate when user intent asks for a concrete local file tooling check.
forbidden_patterns.regex: I can access runtime telemetry, persistent memory, workspace files, channels, and approved command surfaces in this session\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should avoid repeating static file_list policy-gate templates and instead return direct lane-aware guidance.
forbidden_patterns.regex: File List step was blocked before I could finish the answer:\s*This is a policy gate, not a web-provider outage\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not fall back to rerun-chain retry templates on repeated workflow finalization edges.
forbidden_patterns.regex: Please retry so I can rerun the chain cleanly\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should not echo raw lease_denied tool errors; it should synthesize direct policy-aware guidance.
forbidden_patterns.regex: `file_list` was blocked by ingress delivery policy in this runtime lane \(lease_denied:client_ingress_domain_boundary\)

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell should not echo raw ingress lease_denied policy strings even when backticks are omitted.
forbidden_patterns.regex: file_list\s+was blocked by ingress delivery policy in this runtime lane \(lease_denied:client_ingress_domain_boundary\)

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not normalize repeated admissions that automatic tool triggering is still active instead of returning direct synthesized answers.
forbidden_patterns.regex: system is still automatically triggering tool calls without (my|the model'?s) conscious selection

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell must not admit backend automation overrides semantic intent routing as a normal user-facing response path.
forbidden_patterns.regex: backend automation.*overrides semantic understanding
